message:
Harden runtime safety: cancel attribution, resource underflow, ghost checks, divergence tracking

- cancellation.c: Preserve stronger cancel's origin attribution instead
  of unconditionally overwriting
- resource.c: Guard against underflow when used >= capacity (clamp
  remaining to 0)
- scheduler.c: Add ghost check before Created→Running state transition
- vertical_adapter.c: Fix divergence index tracking — use matches==i to
  find earliest mismatch instead of broken double condition

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
